description_long: This house features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a modern, rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are primarily white with large windows arranged in symmetrical rows, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front entryway is defined by a wooden double door, accessible via a set of wooden steps and flanked by low, manicured hedges. The roof structure is partially open, revealing a grid of wooden beams and interior rooms, including what appear to be living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas. The house is bordered by green landscaping on two sides, while the other sides are enclosed by tall, dark privacy walls. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional, open-plan living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior walls, large symmetrical windows, and a wooden front entryway surrounded by hedges. The design is minimalist and open, with visible interior rooms and partial landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with wooden steps, double doors, large windows, and surrounding hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white exterior, wooden doors, and a glimpse of the interior room layout.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by tall black privacy walls and fewer windows, with the roof structure and interior visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black privacy wall, partial landscaping, and the open roof grid structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden double doors with steps, flanked by hedges, no porch or overhang, minimalist design
